name: Cohen and Cohen
description_short: Cohen and Cohen is a credit building provider based in Denver, Colorado. Rated 4.7/5 with 81 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Cohen and Cohen is a credit building provider serving clients in Denver, Colorado. Carrying a 4.7/5.0 Google rating from 81 reviews, Cohen and Cohen has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Denver area looking to build or rebuild their credit history.

Operating as a bankruptcy service, Cohen and Cohen provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit building solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Credit building services like Cohen and Cohen in Denver help consumers who are starting fresh or recovering from credit setbacks. The most effective credit building programs report to all three major credit bureaus and provide tools to track progress over time. When comparing providers, look for transparent pricing, no hidden fees, and verified reporting to Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion.

Consumers in the Denver, Colorado area who are considering Cohen and Cohen should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit building provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
